headers.//: index.html must NOT cache — it points at the hashed JS bundle. The default Firebase Hosting Cache-Control on index.html is max-age=3600 (1 hour), which caused 'site changes aren't showing' bugs: status flips would deploy, the new bundle would be live, but browsers kept reusing a stale index.html that pointed at the previous bundle hash for up to an hour. no-store fixes the loop without breaking the immutable JS/CSS caching above (those are content-hashed, so eternal cache is safe).
